HEARTSTEEL_RELIC.title: Heartsteel
HEARTSTEEL_RELIC.description: Every [blue]3[/blue] turns, each enemy gains [gold]Devour[/gold]. When you hit an enemy with [gold]Devour[/gold] using an Attack card, deal an extra [blue]5 + 10%[/blue] of your max HP as damage, then gain max HP equal to [blue]10%[/blue] of that bonus damage.
HEARTSTEEL_RELIC.flavor: The louder it beats, the harder it is to stop.
